overview: Computer Science advises students on programming systems software engineering artificial intelligence and senior project planning.
Information Systems supports students focused on business technology databases analytics and organizational information systems.
Biology supports students pursuing laboratory life science pre-health and research-focused academic pathways.
Psychology supports students studying behavior mental processes research methods and applied human services.
Business Administration advises students on management finance marketing entrepreneurship and professional development.
Electrical Engineering advises students on circuits electronics embedded systems communications and power systems.
Mathematics supports students in calculus linear algebra statistics modeling and quantitative reasoning.
English advises students on writing literature rhetoric communication-intensive study and graduate preparation.
History advises students on historical study research methods public history teaching and law or graduate school pathways.
Sociology advises students on social theory research methods inequality policy and community-based academic pathways.
Accounting supports students focused on financial reporting auditing taxation analytics and CPA-oriented preparation.
Civil Engineering advises students on structures transportation geotechnical water resources and infrastructure design.
Nursing advises students on clinical progression health sciences patient care preparation and licensure-oriented academic planning.
University Advising helps with general academic planning registration support and referrals to department-specific advisors.
Cloud Computing advises students on infrastructure platforms virtualization automation cybersecurity and cloud architecture.
Architecture advises students on design studios graphics history structures and professional preparation for the built environment.
